title: JF's FoxHearts & GUI
description: A fox-themed UI texture pack – replaces hearts with fox icons, hunger bar with sweet berries, and adds more cozy fox details!
body:
### 📦 Description
This resource pack transforms your Minecraft HUD into a fox-themed visual experience, perfect for anyone who loves these clever forest creatures.

Instead of the standard red hearts, you'll see adorable fox icons representing your health. The hunger bar becomes a row of juicy sweet berries, fitting perfectly with the fox theme. The design stays clean and true to vanilla Minecraft, but adds charming custom touches to make your gameplay more fun and personal.

Additional fox-inspired tweaks are sprinkled throughout the UI to give your survival world a warmer, more nature-connected vibe – without overloading your screen or clashing with other packs.
# 
### 🦊 Features
Fox-themed health bar (fox heads instead of hearts)

Sweet berry hunger bar

Clean and consistent visual style

Lightweight and compatible with most versions

Works well with both vanilla and modded clients
# 
### 🚀 Installation
Download the .zip file

Place it in your resourcepacks folder

Activate it in Minecraft under Options → Resource Packs

Enjoy your foxified Minecraft experience!
# 
### ⚠️ Requirements
No mods required. Works with vanilla Minecraft.
# 
### 🔗 Compatibles
Compatible with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) and [EatingAnimation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
